'''Oso Nim''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] with [[Color/Legends|orange]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] who was living on [[Belsavis/Legends|Belsavis]] in [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]]. She was known as something of a gossip; she spoke to [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] about [[Drub McKumb]]'s disappearance while he and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|his wife]] visited the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in search of clues about the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]. She was also a fan of a sport called [[Puttie]].
